chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-2551 / 2024 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ 1) For orders on office objection. 2) For orders on Misc. No. 104/2025. 3) For orders on Misc. No. 11636/2024. 4) For orders on Misc. No. 12139/2024. 5) For hearing of main case. 10.02.2026. Mr. Shoukat Ali Shaikh, Advocate for Petitioner. M/s. Zahra Sehr Viyani & Rameez Lalani, Advocates for Respondent No. 4. Mr. Shariq Mubashir, AAG. ___________________ By order dated 19.03.2025 the order dated 24.12.2024 was modified and the Respondents were directed to proceed to install transmission line in accordance with law. However, directions were passed that all efforts must be made to ensure that the crops of the Petitioner are not destroyed. In the event that they are destroyed, compensation was directed to be determined by the Assistant Commissioner concerned. Having noted the above, the instant Petition is disposed of with the directions that the Petitioner is at liberty to claim compensation for his destroyed crops, if any, after erection of the noted transmission line. J U D G E J U D G E Arshad/
